description_long: This is a modern, minimalist sofa with a rectangular profile and a low, continuous backrest and armrests that are of equal height. The upholstery is a light beige or cream color with a quilted, grid-like pattern that covers the entire seating, back, and arm surfaces, giving it a uniform and contemporary look. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the frame, with no visible separation, and the padding appears firm and structured. The sofa is supported by four slender, straight wooden legs, with an additional central support leg for stability, all finished in a natural wood tone. The armrests are straight and extend directly from the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette with clean lines. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy beige sofa with quilted upholstery, integrated cushions, and straight wooden legs. The design features a continuous back and armrest at equal height, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, continuous backrest and armrests, and the quilted upholstery pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, boxy armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted, quilted backrest and the alignment of the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the straight armrest and seat depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushion integrated into the frame, uniform in size, with a quilted grid pattern and no loose or segmented cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully padded and covered in the same quilted upholstery, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Five straight, slender wooden legs—one at each corner and one central support—exposed and finished in a natural wood tone, providing a minimalist and stable base.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, continuous backrest that runs the full width of the sofa, matching the height of the armrests, with integrated padding and a quilted surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Quilted, grid-like pattern covering all visible surfaces, giving a textured and uniform appearance with no additional decorative stitching.
